import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut found = false
  mut answer = ""
  while not found
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        answer = trimmed
        found = true
      end
    when None
      println("(none)")
      return
    end
  end
  println(answer)
end
